/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -Wextra -Wpedantic -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,-z,relro -Wl,-z,now -Wl,-z,noexecstack CMakeFiles/glial_tests.dir/test_astrocytes.cpp.o CMakeFiles/glial_tests.dir/test_oligodendrocytes.cpp.o CMakeFiles/glial_tests.dir/test_microglia.cpp.o CMakeFiles/glial_tests.dir/test_glial_integration.cpp.o CMakeFiles/glial_tests.dir/__/python/nimcp_module.c.o -o glial_tests  -Wl,-rpath,/home/bbrelin/nimcp/bin /home/bbrelin/nimcp/bin/libnimcp.so.2.6.2 ../../lib/libgtest.a ../../lib/libgtest_main.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpython3.12.so -lpthread -llz4 -ljansson /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsodium.so ../../lib/libgtest.a
